info.title: CORTEX - Sovereign Memory API
info.description: Local-first memory infrastructure for AI agents. Vector search, temporal facts, cryptographic ledger.

get.description: Subscribe to CORTEX coordination events via SSE.

post.description: Store a fact (scoped to authenticated tenant).

schema.title: Response List All Facts V1 Facts Get

post.description: Batch store up to 100 facts in a single request.

schema.title: Response Batch Store V1 Facts Batch Post

get.description: Recall facts for a specific project with tenant isolation.

schema.title: Response Recall Facts V1 Projects  Project  Facts Get

post.description: Semantic search across all facts (scoped to tenant).

schema.title: Response Search Facts V1 Facts Search Post

get.description: Retrieve version history for a specific fact.

schema.title: Response Get Fact History V1 Facts  Fact Id  History Get

post.description: Trigger Ω₁₃ taint propagation from a compromised/invalidated fact.

schema.title: Response Propagate Taint V1 Facts  Fact Id  Taint Post

get.description: Verify cryptographic integrity of the memory ledger.

schema.title: Response Verify Ledger V1 Facts Verify Get

post.description: Cast a consensus vote (verify/dispute) on a fact.
Cast a reputation-weighted consensus vote (RWC).

get.description: Retrieve all votes for a specific fact (Tenant Isolated).

schema.title: Response List Votes V1 Facts  Fact Id  Votes Get
Response Deprecate Fact V1 Facts  Fact Id  Delete

get.description: Get a single fact by ID.
Get the causal chain for a fact (up=ancestors, down=descendants).

schema.title: Response Get Causal Chain V1 Facts  Fact Id  Chain Get

post.description: Semantic + Graph-RAG search across facts (scoped to tenant).

schema.title: Response Search Facts V1 Search Post

get.description: Semantic + Graph-RAG search via GET (scoped to tenant).

schema.title: Response Search Facts Get V1 Search Get

post.description:
RAG endpoint: search → synthesize → answer.

Searches CORTEX memory for relevant facts, then uses the configured
LLM to synthesize an answer grounded in those facts.

Returns 503 if no LLM provider is configured.

Streaming RAG endpoint: search → synthesize → stream answer.

Yields SSE 'data: ' events containing text chunks.

get.description: Check LLM provider status and list supported providers. [STATUS]

Sovereign Export - dumps project memory to a secure JSON artifact.

Enforces path incarceration to prevent directory traversal.

Deep Health Check - probes all CORTEX subsystems.

Returns 200 if all checks pass, 503 if any subsystem is degraded.
Designed for Kubernetes liveness/readiness probes.
Expose engine diagnostics and memory health metrics.

post.description:
Sovereign Key Provisioning.

First key is self-provisioned (bootstrap).
Subsequent keys require 'admin' permission.

get.description: Expose non-sensitive metadata for all provisioned keys.

schema.title: Response List Api Keys V1 Admin Keys Get

post.description:
Manifest a session handoff artifact with hot context and recent episodes.

Used for transferring agentic state between platforms (macOS -> Web).

schema.title: Response Generate Handoff Context V1 Handoff Post

post.description:
Execute a JIT credibility strike for a project.

Computes exergy, constructs Merkle roots, signs the root,
performs replay validation, and takes database snapshots.

schema.title: Response Execute Credibility Strike V1 Admin Credibility Strike Post

post.description: Record an activity heartbeat for automatic time tracking.

schema.title: Response Record Heartbeat V1 Heartbeat Post

get.description: Get today's time tracking summary.
Get time tracking report for the last N days.
Get daily time history.

schema.title: Response Get Time History V1 Time History Get

post.description:
OMNI-TRANSLATE: Sovereign Core translation endpoint.

Translates a dictionary of texts into multiple target languages simultaneously
using Gemini 2.0 Flash for optimal speed and cost.
Ensures that the output strictly matches the input schema.

The Oracle: Run a Sovereign Agent audit.
Requires a valid CORTEX API Key (provisioned via Stripe subscription).

502.description: Oracle Engine Error: LLM provider is failing.

503.description: The Oracle is currently disconnected from the LLM core.

get.description: Get last daemon watchdog check results.

schema.title: Response Daemon Status V1 Daemon Status Get

get.description: Serve the embedded memory dashboard.

post.description: Register a new agent for Reputation-Weighted Consensus (Requires Admin).

get.description: List all agents for the current tenant.

schema.title: Response List Agents V1 Agents Get

get.description: Get agent details and current reputation.
Get entity graph for a specific project.

schema.title: Response Get Graph V1 Graph  Project  Get

get.description: Get entity graph across all projects.

schema.title: Response Get Graph All V1 Graph Get

get.description: Check the cryptographic integrity of all ledgers (Tx and Votes).

post.description: Manually trigger a Merkle root checkpoint for recent transactions.

get.description: Alias for /status - performs full integrity verification.

post.description: Launch a new swarm mission through the CORTEX Launchpad.

get.description: List recent mission intents and reports from the ledger.

schema.title: Response List Missions V1 Missions  Get

post.description: Execute X-Ray 13D scan on a project.
Record a MEJORAlo audit session in the ledger.

get.description: Retrieve MEJORAlo session history for a project.

schema.title: Response Get History V1 Mejoralo History Get

post.description: Validate the 7 Seals for production readiness.

get.description: Get the current SovereignGate status.
List all pending L3 actions awaiting approval.

schema.title: Response List Pending V1 Gate Pending Get

post.description: Approve a pending L3 action with HMAC signature.
Deny a pending L3 action.

get.description: View the SovereignGate audit log.
Run ambient context inference and return the current context snapshot.
List raw ambient signals without running inference.

schema.title: Response List Signals V1 Context Signals Get

get.description: Retrieve past context inference snapshots.

schema.title: Response Context History V1 Context History Get

get.description: Get random contextual tips.
List all tip categories with counts.
Get tips filtered by category.
Get tips scoped to a specific project.
Aggregate swarm health and load metrics.

post.description: Provision a new isolated execution environment (Hito 3).

get.description: Get metadata for a specific worktree.

post.description:
Trigger the Psychohistory Fracture Simulator (Hito 4).
Orchestrates 50 specialized agents using a Semaphore to calculate catastrophic cascades.
Extracts a Byzantine consensus O(1) Contingency Crystal.
Ingest sovereign telemetry facts (C5-REAL) from external edge sensors.
Ingest sovereign telemetry facts (C5-REAL) from external edge sensors.
Ingest sovereign telemetry facts (C5-REAL) from external edge sensors.

get.description: Retrieve all active mafia nodes (base + dynamic).

post.description: Add a new mafia node fact and push to all active extensions.

get.description: Retrieve all active mafia nodes (base + dynamic).

post.description: Add a new mafia node fact and push to all active extensions.

get.description: Retrieve all active mafia nodes (base + dynamic).

get.description: Get current month's API usage for the authenticated tenant.

schema.title: Response Get Usage V1 Usage Get

get.description: Get usage history for the last N months.

schema.title: Response Get Usage History V1 Usage History Get

get.description: Get per-endpoint breakdown for current month.

schema.title: Response Get Usage Breakdown V1 Usage Breakdown Get

get.description: Retrieve runtime health report.

schema.title: Response Get Health V1 Runtime Health Get

get.description: Get the memory recovery report generated during boot.

post.description:
Create a free-tier account. Returns API key immediately.

No email verification required for MVP - key is active on creation.

get.description: Quick health check - score, grade, healthy boolean.

schema.title: Response Health Index Check V1 Health Check Get

get.description: Numeric score only (0-100).

schema.title: Response Health Index Score V1 Health Score Get

get.description: Full health report with recommendations and warnings.

schema.title: Response Health Index Report V1 Health Report Get

get.description: Raw metric snapshots for monitoring dashboards.

schema.title: Response Health Index Metrics V1 Health Metrics Get

get.description: Prometheus text exposition format.
Persisted health score history.

schema.title: Response Health Index History V1 Health History Get

post.description:
Dry-run a store proposal against StorageGuard (Ω₃).

Returns 200 {valid: true} or 400 with specific violation details.

schema.title: Response Dry Run Guard V1 Trust Guard Post

get.description: Retrieve the Bayesian trust profile for a specific agent.
Generate aggregate compliance report (EU AI Act Art 12).

post.description: Request a quote and SLA for an agent execution job.
Execute a previously quoted job and receive proof of execution.

get.description: Verify cryptographic proof of execution for a job.

schema.title: Response Verify Job Proof V1 Taas Jobs  Job Id  Verify Get

get.description: Server-Sent Events endpoint for real-time CORTEX telemetry.

post.description:
OpenAI-compatible Chat Completions endpoint.
Passes the output through the Deterministic Labyrinth (Exergy Filter).

ApiKeyResponse.title: ApiKeyResponse
ApiKeyResponse.description: Response after creating an API key.

AskRequest.title: AskRequest
AskRequest.description: RAG query: search CORTEX memory and synthesize an answer.

AskResponse.title: AskResponse
AskResponse.description: RAG response with answer and sources.

AskSource.title: AskSource
AskSource.description: A source fact that contributed to the answer.

p95_latency_ms.title: P95 Latency Ms
p95_latency_ms.description: p95 latency of ambient context boot

stale_ratio.title: Stale Ratio
stale_ratio.description: Ratio of facts older than 180 days with no hits

OracleRequest.title: OracleRequest
OracleRequest.description: Request to trigger The Oracle audit on a target.

simulated_years.title: Simulated Years
simulated_years.description: Number of years to simulate into the future

project.title: Project
project.description: Project namespace to save the crystal

RecoveryReport.title: RecoveryReport
RecoveryReport.description: Report of the agent's memory recovery status during boot.

include_graph.title: Include Graph
include_graph.description: Include the localized context subgraph in response

fact_type.title: Fact Type
fact_type.description: Type: knowledge, decision, mistake, bridge, ghost

texts.title: Texts
texts.description: Dictionary of key-value pairs to translate. Max 100 items.

context.title: Context
context.description: Optional context about the application or tone.

translations.title: Translations
translations.description: A dictionary mapping language codes to their translated key-value pairs.

value.title: Value
value.description: 1 to verify, -1 to dispute, 0 to remove

vote.title: Vote
vote.description: 1 to verify, -1 to dispute, 0 to remove
